one_liner: RKLB at $82.55 with RSI 35.6 near oversold and Phase B Wyckoff accumulation — no DCF (pre-revenue) and Grade D fundamentals keep this a speculative watch with earnings August 6.

price_action.intraday_story: RKLB gapped down and sold off all day from $86.29 to close near the low at $82.55. Bearish intraday close below both EMAs (EMA50 $99.72, EMA200 $103.52).

news_catalyst.headline: Starlink 10 Gbps Announcement Benefits Space Sector Sentiment
news_catalyst.summary: Elon Musk confirmed Starlink can deliver 10 Gbps speeds — a SpaceX/Starlink news item that lifts space economy sentiment broadly. RKLB is a small launch vehicle / spacecraft manufacturer that competes in adjacent markets. No direct RKLB impact.

technical.summary: RKLB is well below both EMAs (EMA50 $99.72, EMA200 $103.52) — deeply in a downtrend. RSI 35.6 is approaching oversold. Wyckoff Phase B bullish bias is a positive signal, and the Wyckoff support at $76.14 is the key floor. No DCF (pre-revenue). Watch for a reversal candle at $76-78 support.
technical.wyckoff_narrative: Phase B accumulation at the lower range boundary. RSI approaching oversold — watching for a Selling Climax (SC) at $76.14 support for a potential Spring setup.

valuation.summary: Pre-revenue — DCF not applicable. Speculative launch vehicle play.

key_strengths: Neutron rocket development positions for medium-lift market
Electron manifest growing with government contracts
key_concerns: Sentiment score 0.157 — mild positive but limited coverage
fundamentals.summary: D grade reflects pre-profitability stage. Watch for catalysts from Neutron rocket development milestones.

risks: Break below Wyckoff support $76.14 would accelerate downtrend toward $60s
Earnings August 6 — any launch failure or timeline delay would be a severe negative
